competitors.title: AI Agent Sandbox Comparison: E2B vs Daytona vs Firecracker
key_points: Analysis of sandbox providers for AI agent code execution
E2B offers $100 free credit for development and testing
Daytona focuses on developer experience with integrated tooling
Blaxel specializes in persistent sandboxes with fast resume capabilities
Firecracker microVM technology provides lightweight isolation
